title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 16 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 16 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 16 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 16/07/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures continued their strong upward trend, with the most-traded contract I2509 reaching a high of 777.5 and eventuallyclosing at 773, marking a daily increase of 1.05%. Steel mills purchased as needed, with some experiencing weaker sales of finished products and a corresponding decrease in purchase willingness. The market transaction atmosphere was average.
